response.step_by_step_log: Watched the video from start to finish. Analyzed the audio for vocal music. Identified that the audio track consists of background instrumental music during the characters' speech and performance interactions. No vocal songs were detected. Consequently, no web search for lyrics was performed.
response.global_summary: A 3D virtual concert sneak peek featuring characters interacting with the audience. The background audio is purely instrumental throughout.

scenes.description: Virtual characters dancing, posing, and speaking to the audience on a stage. Background audio is instrumental music.
Short transition period with a blackout.
Still image featuring the four characters with a Japanese text message thanking the viewers for watching the sneak peek.
